debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
ι : Type u_1
k : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
P : Type u_4
inst✝⁴ : Ring k
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝² : Module k V
inst✝¹ : AddTorsor V P
p : ι → P
s : Finset ι
inst✝ : Nontrivial k
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → k
hw : ∑ i, w i = 1
hp : (Finset.affineCombination k Finset.univ (p ∘ Subtype.val)) w ∈ affineSpan k (Set.range (p ∘ Subtype.val))
⊢ (Finset.affineCombination k Finset.univ (p ∘ Subtype.val)) w =
    (Finset.affineCombination k s p) fun i => if hi : i ∈ s then w ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0

failed_attempts:
classical
      simpa [Finset.affineCombination, Finset.weightedVSub, Finset.centerMass, Finset.univ_eq_attach,
        Finset.sum_attach, Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]

simpa [Finset.affineCombination, Finset.affineCombinationAux, Finset.weightedVSub,
        Finset.sum_attach, Finset.sum_dite, Function.comp, dite_mul, Finset.mul_sum] using rfl

simpa [Finset.univ_eq_attach, Finset.affineCombination_attach] using
        (Finset.affineCombination_eq_affineCombination_of_eq_on _ (s := s) (p := p)
          (w := fun i => if hi : i ∈ s then w ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0)
          (s' := (Finset.univ : Finset {x // x ∈ (↑s : Set ι)}))
          (p' := p ∘ Subtype.val) (w' := w)
          (by intro i hi; simpa [hi] ))

ext i
      by_cases hi : i ∈ s
      · simp [hi]
      · simp [hi]

simpa [Finset.affineCombination, Finset.univ_eq_attach, Finset.sum_attach,
        Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]
